parameters.command: cd /tmp && rm -f n8n_transcript*.vtt; yt-dlp --skip-download --write-auto-sub --sub-lang en --sub-format vtt -o "n8n_transcript.%(ext)s" "{{ $json.selectedUrl }}" > /tmp/ytdlp.log 2>&1; if ls n8n_transcript*.vtt 1> /dev/null 2>&1; then cat n8n_transcript*.vtt; else echo "NO_TRANSCRIPT_AVAILABLE"; fi
